commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an Anthropic Claude Haiku 4.5 static catalog row and aliases, carries manifest maxTokens/mediaInput into agent catalog rows, adjusts OpenRouter pricing normalization, and updates focused catalog/normalization tests.

PR surface: Source +31, Tests +114. Total +145 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source, but not by running the CLI in this read-only review. Current main and v2026.6.1 have static Anthropic discovery without the Haiku 4.5 row, matching the reported model_not_found path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should wait on contributor-supplied real behavior proof and a maintainer call on the compat-sensitive Anthropic id canonicalization.

target.title: [codex] fix Anthropic Haiku 4.5 static catalog
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #90088.

Adds the missing native Anthropic API-key static catalog entry for Claude Haiku 4.5 and maps rolling/dotted Haiku 4.5 refs to the dated Anthropic API id.

Related PRs checked:
- #87719 changes Haiku fallback/migration behavior, but does not add the missing native Anthropic catalog row.
- #88587 improves prefixed Anthropic normalization context, but does not add `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001` to the native Anthropic static catalog.

## What Changed

- Added `anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001` with text/image input, reasoning enabled, 200k context, 64k max output, and Anthropic image metadata matching the current vision rows.
- Added aliases for `claude-haiku-4-5` and `claude-haiku-4.5` to resolve to the dated catalog row.
- Preserved `maxTokens` and `mediaInput` when manifest catalog rows are exposed through the agent catalog boundary, so the static metadata remains available beyond normalization.
- Added regression coverage for static catalog resolution, manifest catalog loading, and Anthropic id normalization.

## Validation

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/model.static-catalog.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-catalog.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/model-catalog-core/src/provider-model-id-normalization.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/anthropic/openclaw.plugin.json packages/model-catalog-core/src/provider-model-id-normalization.ts packages/model-catalog-core/src/provider-model-id-normalization.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/model.static-catalog.test.ts src/agents/model-catalog.test.ts src/agents/model-catalog.ts src/agents/model-catalog.types.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json packages/model-catalog-core/src/provider-model-id-normalization.ts packages/model-catalog-core/src/provider-model-id-normalization.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/model.static-catalog.test.ts src/agents/model-catalog.test.ts src/agents/model-catalog.ts src/agents/model-catalog.types.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-src-90088.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.packages.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-packages-90088.tsbuildinfo`

Source-runtime proof without live Anthropic credentials:

```text
claude-haiku-4-5 -> anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 input=text,image context=200000 max=64000
claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 -> anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 input=text,image context=200000 max=64000
anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5 -> anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 input=text,image context=200000 max=64000
```

`ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` was not present locally, so live Anthropic completion was not tested.
target.author: harjothkhara
